name: Capcom Play System II
description: Capcom's 1990s arcade hardware platform for fighting games, beat 'em ups, shooters, and licensed arcade releases.

eras.title: Fighting Game Era
eras.description: CPS II becomes Capcom's main fighting-game board, spanning Street Fighter, Darkstalkers, Marvel, and crossover fighters.

eras.title: Late Arcade Era
eras.description: Late CPS II releases and genre variety continue alongside newer arcade hardware.
